title: Relationship Between Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Reinforcement Learning
description: A hierarchical flowchart showing how Deep Learning and Reinforcement Learning are subfields of Machine Learning, and how they can intersect.
relationships: Machine Learning is the overarching field
Deep Learning is a specialized subset of ML using neural networks
Reinforcement Learning is a separate subset of ML focused on agent-based decision making
Deep Reinforcement Learning is the intersection where Deep Learning models (like Deep Neural Networks) are used as function approximators within a Reinforcement Learning framework
